background.notes: No raster image background fill detected on 1:35 itself. Only a soft mint-to-white gradient. The visual lifestyle photo is provided by the rounded card 75:3228 floating on the right. There is also a secondary 1:33 frame (white card) that sits behind / beside.

zOrderTopToBottom: 1:53 (border-strip overlay at y=1102, sits visually on top of the band)
1:35 (gradient bg + giant Devanagari word बोधि at y=0)
1:33 (white secondary frame y=221, behind everything else)

children.name: image
children.notes: 240x240 empty image slot in the top-left corner. Likely a small texture/logo mark or intentionally empty. No fill resolved in MCP response — treat as optional decorative; can be ignored or replaced by CSS pattern.

Giant translucent display wordmark. Sits on the right side, overlapping the rounded card visually. The teal #038f9f at opacity 0.1 reads as a watermark-like backdrop. Use real Devanagari glyphs (Noto Sans Devanagari fallback) — do NOT romanize.

subBlocks.notes: Outer hero band. The Fraunces 'Wonk' variation axis gives the playful italic flourish on certain Latin glyphs but mainly drives display character. Treat opacity 0.1 watermark as the foundational layer of personality.

children.name: image
children.notes: Empty 240x240 slot — appears unused in final render. Likely a remnant placeholder. Skip in build.

subBlocks.notes: A near-empty white frame stacked below the main gradient hero. Functions like a 'page body' starter — provides clean white below the gradient. Implement as the surrounding section background rather than a separate component.

images.intrinsicHints: Renders inside the 1678x952 frame at h=140.44%, w=63.77%, top=-20.22%, left=0 — image is cropped tall and wide, with significant overflow above and to the right. Source aspect appears taller than the frame.
images.borderRadius: implicit (frame clips with overflow-hidden — visually a soft rounded rectangle, ~24–32px). Confirm with screenshot.

subBlocks.notes: Big hero lifestyle image, anchored off-canvas to the right (x=1146 places it ~60% across; width 1678 means most of the card extends beyond the 1920 viewport on the right). Treat as a right-anchored hero photo with the headline lockup floating over the left edge. The image is the primary visual asset of the hero — REQUIRED download.

children.notes: Eyebrow line with Devanagari 'बोधि' followed by a middle-dot · and 'The awakening'. Two spaces around the · in the source. Preserve diacritic-free Devanagari and the spacing.

children.textContent: A school for teachers and a home for seekers.

textRuns.text: A school for teachers and a

children.notes: Two-color headline. First clause ('A school for teachers and a ') is navy #1d3e59; second clause ('home for seekers.') is brand-primary #009877. Tight 77px leading on 90px type (very compressed).

children.textContent: Bodhi is a yoga teacher training institute and practice studio. We train future teachers, host workshops in health and wellness, and hold daily classes online and in person.

children.notes: Three-line description. Color is a muted slate at 71% opacity — maps to a token like text-muted-foreground.

subBlocks.notes: Anchored at x=308 (the global page gutter). All three text rows share that left edge — the entire lockup hangs off a single left rail.

chips.label: I want to teach Yoga & Pillate
I want to learn Yoga & Pillate

interactiveElements.label: I want to teach Yoga & Pillate →
I want to learn Yoga & Pillate →

subBlocks.notes: Three pill cards arranged in a row. Each chip = eyebrow (teal uppercase, 15px) + bold label (24px black) + circular 44px arrow button in a chip-specific color. All chips share white bg + soft gray border + dropshadow. Note 'Pillate' is the source spelling (likely intended 'Pilates' — preserve verbatim and flag as content-side typo upstream).

subBlocks.layoutNotes: Inner container is 2770.34px wide (wider than viewport — content overflows, indicating an infinite/scrolling marquee). Flex row, gap=96px, padding 0 26px.
subBlocks.notes: This is the 8 limbs of Ashtanga Yoga (Yama, Niyama, Āsana, Prāṇāyāma, Pratyāhāra, Dhāraṇā, Dhyāna, Samādhi). The repeated items + 2770px content width inside a 1920px viewport strongly suggests a marquee scroller — implement with CSS keyframes (translateX -50%) for an infinite horizontal scroll. Frosted glass: white 73% alpha + 62.6px backdrop blur. Preserve all diacritics exactly (ā, ṇ, etc.).

interactiveSummary.label: I want to teach Yoga & Pillate →
I want to learn Yoga & Pillate →

assets.notes: Primary lifestyle photo inside the rounded right-side card. Frame 1678x952; image crops with overflow.
Background is just a linear-gradient(to bottom, #f0fff8, #ffffff). No raster texture detected. Implement in CSS.
240x240 image slots in 1:35 and 1:33 are empty placeholders. Skip unless requirements emerge.

implementationNotes: Layer stack from back to front: (1) base gradient hero #f0fff8 → #fff (1:35), (2) right-anchored rounded photo card with hero-photo.jpg (75:3228), (3) giant translucent बोधि wordmark at opacity 0.1 in #038f9f (1:37, lives inside 1:35 but reads as a layer above the photo card depending on z-index — verify with screenshot), (4) headline lockup at x=308 (1:83), (5) offer chip strip horizontally centered at y=859 (1:591), (6) frosted-glass niche marquee strip at y=1102 (1:53).

Fonts to load via next/font: Fraunces (with Wonk + Soft variation axes), Manrope (Bold + Medium), Host Grotesk (Bold), Instrument Sans (Regular + SemiBold), Noto Sans Devanagari (Regular + Bold). SF Pro Display for the arrow can be substituted with system-ui / Inter without loss.

Color tokens to favor: text-foreground for #1d3e59 (navy headline left half is close to a slate-800 — but design uses a specific navy #1d3e59 not the navy in tokens; either alias as text-headline or hardcode). text-brand for #009877 (brand-primary, headline right half + chip 3 button). text-brand-dark approximation: #00282c is too dark; use #00654f directly for chip eyebrows or alias as text-brand-shade-dark. brand-shade #8ee0ce is unused in hero. brand-lite #f0fff8 IS used as the top of the gradient. border-2 #f0f0f0 is close to chip border but actual is rgba(123,123,123,0.2) — keep that exact value for soft gray.
Devanagari rendering: ensure font-feature-settings allow ligatures; the बोधि character is a 2-char cluster (बो + धि). Set lang='hi' on the wordmark span to help browsers select the correct script.

Responsive: the photo card extends to x=2824 (1146+1678), well off-screen. Treat right card as 'bleeds off the right edge'. On <1280px viewports, switch to stacked layout — photo above, headline below, chips below — and shrink the बोधि wordmark to ~280px (or hide entirely on mobile).

Marquee strip (1:53): implement with two duplicate flex tracks and CSS animation translateX(0 → -50%) over ~40s, gap=96px, paused on hover (motion-safe). Backdrop blur 62.6px is heavy — degrade to a flat rgba(255,255,255,0.85) on browsers without backdrop-filter support.

Offer chips (1:591): the three brand colors on the arrow buttons (#008498 teal, #0d9800 green, #009877 brand) are intentionally different — preserve that variety. Chip background and shadow are uniform.

Headline (1:89) two-color treatment: split on the literal phrase boundary 'A school for teachers and a ' (navy #1d3e59) | 'home for seekers.' (brand #009877). Use two <span>s, not CSS gradient text, so screen readers read it as one sentence.

बोधि wordmark (1:37): 520px / -20.8px tracking / opacity 0.1 / Fraunces with Wonk=1. On smaller breakpoints scale to 50vw or hide. Do NOT use as text in the <h1> — keep it aria-hidden because the eyebrow already says 'बोधि · The awakening'.
Sub-copy (1:84) uses rgba(71,71,71,0.71). Mapping to existing token: foreground/70 if a neutral foreground at 71% opacity exists; otherwise hardcode the color.
